# Summary

Describe the contribution and why it is needed.

## Changed Files

-

## Contribution Type

Select all that apply:

- [ ] Dataset card
- [ ] Benchmark task
- [ ] Evidence card
- [ ] Run manifest
- [ ] Feature descriptor
- [ ] Baseline model or configuration
- [ ] Reproduction report
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Code or tooling

## Reproducibility Notes

Describe commands, environment, input assumptions, output artifacts, and any deviations from documented workflows.

## Review Gate Checklist

- [ ] Final review bundle completeness was checked:
  `python3 scripts/check_review_bundle_completeness.py`
- [ ] Review loop readiness was checked:
  `python3 scripts/check_review_loop_readiness.py`

## Claim-Boundary Checklist

- [ ] This PR does not claim solved delivery.
- [ ] This PR does not claim wet-lab validation unless supported by cited external evidence and reviewed.
- [ ] This PR does not claim clinical or therapeutic effect.
- [ ] This PR does not claim universal delivery prediction.
- [ ] This PR does not claim state-of-the-art status.
- [ ] This PR does not claim maturity comparable to AlphaFold.
- [ ] Claims are scoped to dataset, split, metric, evidence level, and provenance.

## Public / Private Data Checklist

- [ ] No private or proprietary data are included without rights to share.
- [ ] No restricted row-level data are included without release approval.
- [ ] No sensitive candidate rankings or private sequences are included.
- [ ] Source attribution and release posture are documented where relevant.

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, tokens, passwords, private keys, or environment values are included.
- [ ] No private data without rights are included.
- [ ] No unsupported validation claims are included.
- [ ] No private resource or program references are included.

## Reviewer Notes

List review requests, open questions, or areas needing scientific, reproducibility, data, or claim-boundary review.
